page_lines: Honorable Lance E. Walker, Chief Judge
Jennifer P. Lyons, Clerk of Court
Local Rules of Practice for the District of Maine
Where can I get legal advice?
Notice Re Third-Party Services and Access to Records in CM/ECF
Welcome to the Court’s new Opinions Landing Page.
District Court opinions are available online from the Government Publishing Office (GPO)
. Please visit the Government Publishing Office website

to view court opinions issued by judicial officers for the United States District Court for the District of Maine. The United States Courts Opinions (USCOURTS) collection is a collaborative effort between the U.S. Government Publishing Office and the Administrative Office of the United States Courts to provide public access to opinions from selected United States appellate, district, and bankruptcy courts. The content of this collection dates back to approximately April 2005, though searchable electronic holdings for some courts may be incomplete for this earlier time period.
Once an opinion is located, all associated opinions within the same case can be accessed from the opinion's More Information page.
Useful Links to Access Court Opinions:
For assistance about the availability of court opinions, please contact the Clerk’s Office at (207) 780-3356.
